title: 3D AssetLoader.js -- Texture, GLTF, audio loading with progress
description: LoadingManager with progress callback. 4-tier priority loading. GLTFLoader+DRACOLoader for models. RGBELoader for HDRI. TextureLoader for PBR sets. Audio fetch+decode. Returns promises. Loading screen overlay with progress bar.

title: Phase 2A: Update deploy.sh for new Vite build pipeline
description: Rewrite deploy.sh per ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 2.5 and docs/research/engine-architecture.md section 7. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm build, rsync dist/ to timothason:/var/www/borchardlabs.com/. Document the nginx cache-header block separately in docs/deploy.md.

title: config.js -- Species data, probability tables, and constants
description: Create config.js with all species data (8 species), size distributions, color palettes, encounter probabilities, weather modifiers, cover object weights, and rendering colors. Single source of truth for all biological constants. No dependencies.

title: Build student portfolio page
description: Completed experiments, collected data, published research.

title: Decide i18n scope expansion beyond en
description: Open question Q7 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. Architecture is in place from Phase 2 (useTranslation hook, en strings file, lint rule). Decide at Phase 7 whether to author additional locales.

title: Build experiment config/setup screen
description: Pre-launch parameter selection, saved as JSON for reproducibility.

title: Integrate ViewManager into BatesianMimicrySim
description: Modify BatesianMimicrySim.js: create ViewManager in init(), apply camera transform in render(), add 'transitioning' sub-state, convert _handleCanvasClick to use screenToWorld(), wire transect->approach on object click, approach->transect on escape/back.

title: Decide telemetry backend (build vs remove consent UI)
description: Open question Q5 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. Per docs/research/game-systems.md section 7, the consent prompt is suppressed by default behind VITE_TELEMETRY_ENABLED. Either build a first-party backend or remove the consent UI entirely.

title: Natural Selection simulation
description: Darwin's finches beak depth, peppered moths, guppies. Selection differential calculation.

title: FieldNotebook.js -- Interactive data collection
description: Extends DataCollector. Two modes: read (scrollable table) and entry (interactive form). Auto-populates entry #, time, cover obj, species from ID. Student fills SVL, TL, mass, sex, age class, substrate moisture, notes. Validates ranges. Styled like Rite in the Rain notebook. Inherits CSV export. Depends on config.js.

title: Build experiment description page template
description: Overview, learning objectives, skills gained, sidebar with quick facts, Coming Soon simulation button.

title: Build experiment catalog page
description: Card grid with filtering by discipline, thumbnails, difficulty indicators for all 16 experiments.

title: AnalysisPanel.js -- Post-survey analysis UI
description: Standalone UI. Loads survey data from FieldNotebook. Renders: species frequency bar chart (canvas), mimic:model ratio visualization, ID accuracy breakdown. Guided questions with input fields. Chi-square test walkthrough. Comparison to expected frequencies. Run Another Survey button. Depends on config.js.

title: 3D UIManager.js -- World-space VR panels + desktop HTML
description: VR: world-space panels via ThreeMeshUI or canvas-to-texture for ID challenge, notebook, HUD. Desktop: HTML overlays (slide-in panel, notebook, HUD bar). Wire to existing FieldNotebook.js, IdentificationChallenge.js logic, AnalysisPanel.js. Both modes produce identical data.

title: ForestEnvironment.js -- Forest state and floor rendering
description: Extends Environment. Holds date/season/weather/moisture state. Owns CoverObject array. generateTransect() places objects with spatial autocorrelation. render() draws layered forest floor: soil base, leaf litter, moss patches, debris, transect markers. Pre-renders background to offscreen canvas. Seasonal color palette. Depends on config.js, WeatherSystem, CoverObject.

title: Build Publications page (placeholder)
description: Explain the Student Research Archive concept, submissions opening soon notice.

title: Phase 2B2: AssetManager with GLTF/Draco/Meshopt/KTX2 loader setup
description: src/engine/assets/loaders.ts and AssetManager.ts. Singleton GLTFLoader configured with DRACOLoader, KTX2Loader, MeshoptDecoder per docs/research/asset-pipeline.md section 2. Decoder WASM at public/libs/draco/ and public/libs/basis/, copied during build. Direct loader instantiation in lab code is forbidden (lint rule).

title: Build mimicry data collection tools
description: Attack log, learning curve tracker, survival rate calculator for mimicry experiments.

title: Write experiment protocol and instructions
description: In-simulation guide for students running the elephant seal experiment.

title: Implement Hoverfly/Wasp mimicry
description: Garden environment, hoverflies mimicking yellowjacket wasps.

title: [engine][research] Phase 0 Agent 1: Engine Architecture & Stack Validation
description: Validate Three.js + R3F + Rapier vs vanilla Three.js. Define engine-vs-content boundary contract, scene management, game state architecture, build tool config (Vite + TS + R3F), project structure, deployment evolution. Output: docs/research/engine-architecture.md

title: CoverObject.js -- Interactive cover objects
description: Standalone class. Represents rocks, logs, bark, boards on the transect. Properties: position, type, visual state (covered/lifting/uncovered), quality score. Methods: render(), hitTest(), flip(). 250ms lift animation. Typed rendering: rock=irregular gray polygon, log=brown rectangle, board=clean rectangle, bark=thin curved shape. Depends on config.js.

title: Phase 2B3: Settings-driven keyboard and gamepad rebind
description: src/engine/input/rebindStore.ts plus the rebind UI in the SettingsMenu. Per docs/research/interaction-system.md section 9. Conflicts prompt swap. Persisted to save:global -> globalSettingsOverride.bindings. Touch and VR remain fixed in v1; documented as a known accessibility gap for Phase 7.

title: Design database schema
description: Users, sessions, experiment data, publications, courses. SQLite initially.

title: 3D DesktopControls.js -- PointerLock WASD first-person
description: PointerLockControls from Three.js addons. WASD movement at 2m/s. Shift to crouch (camera Y 1.65->0.85m). Mouse look. Click to interact via InputManager. Terrain-following Y position.

title: Phase 2B3: XR controller + hand tracking input bridge
description: src/engine/input/sources/xr.ts. Bridge between @react-three/xr's useXRInputSourceState and the unified action map. Includes the hand-tracking grab path that bypasses the kinematic body (per docs/research/interaction-system.md risk #1) for held objects.

title: BatesianMimicrySim.js -- Main simulation orchestrator
description: Extends Simulation. Orchestrates full flow: setup -> surveying -> identifying -> recording -> reviewing -> analyzing. Override start() for render-only loop. Manages sub-states within running. Canvas click handling routed by sub-state. Wires events between all components. Builds custom field HUD. Depends on all other batesian-mimicry files.

title: 3D main.js -- Three.js renderer, scene, render loop, VRButton
description: Entry point. WebGLRenderer with ACESFilmic tone mapping, PCFSoft shadows. PerspectiveCamera. Scene with FogExp2. Import map for Three.js CDN. VRButton for WebXR. Render loop (renderer.setAnimationLoop). Creates canvas, mounts to container.

title: Decide music sourcing strategy
description: Open question Q1 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. No music tracks have been sourced. Options: CC0 catalogue (Incompetech CC BY, itch.io free packs), original composition. Decision required before Phase 4 audio team begins.

title: Push repo to GitHub
description: Initial commit of existing content, create GitHub remote, push.

title: Optimal Foraging simulation
description: Depleting patches, give-up time measurement, marginal value theorem testing.

title: Phase 2C: TransportControls component bound to game store
description: src/engine/hud/TransportControls.tsx. Play/Pause/Step/Reset + speed slider. btn/btn-sm styling from main.css. Reads transport + speed from the gameStore, dispatches setTransport/setSpeed. VR variant via uikit Button nodes with 40x40mm hit targets and hapticPulse on press.

title: Phase 2B1: Settings slice (audio, graphics, input, accessibility) with persistence
description: src/engine/state/settingsSlice.ts. Schema per docs/research/game-systems.md section 4. Defaults from DEFAULT_SETTINGS. Persists into save:global -> globalSettingsOverride. Reads OS prefers-reduced-motion to default accessibility.reduceMotion. Each settings change debounced at 250ms before write to localforage. Three preset shortcuts (Cinema, Classroom, Silent Mode) for audio.

title: Phase 2B1: Science worker shell with Comlink typed RPC
description: src/engine/runtime/scienceWorker.ts. Generic worker shell, the lab loads in. Accepts STEP, RESET, LOAD_SAVE, DUMP_SAVE, EXPORT_CSV messages; emits TICK_COMMITTED deltas. Uses Comlink for typed RPC. Stores lab instance + RNG + sim state in worker memory. Main thread cannot mutate worker state; one-way control + delta event stream per ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 3.2.

title: Build base Agent class
description: Position, velocity, sprite rendering, behavior state machine, naturalistic movement patterns.

title: Build About page
description: Project info, Mason's background, dissertation context, experience types, contact info.

title: Build seal-specific data collection
description: Ethogram entry form, interaction matrix, copulation logger for elephant seal simulation.

title: Phase 2B3: Touch input with virtual joystick + tap interactions
description: src/engine/input/sources/touch.ts. Fixed-position virtual joystick (lower-left default; lower-right under accessibility.oneHanded). Tap to interact, two-finger tap for inspect, two-finger hold for notebook. Joystick overlay calls event.stopPropagation to keep touches off the R3F raycaster.

title: Species Diversity simulation
description: Quadrat/transect sampling, Shannon-Wiener and Simpson's indices, species accumulation curves.

title: Phase 2C: i18n strings/en.ts + useTranslation hook + no-literal-string lint rule
description: src/engine/i18n/strings/en.ts and useTranslation.ts per docs/research/game-systems.md section 9. Flat key-value object, dot notation. The hook reads locale from settings (default 'en'). ESLint rule no-literal-string scoped to src/engine/hud/ to prevent bare JSX strings from creeping in.

title: Decide AlleleField inclusion in Phase 5 Hardy-Weinberg
description: Open question Q6 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. Optional sparse instanced organism field for the HW lab. Visual flair only -- the stratigraphic column is the headline. If Phase 5 budget is tight, defer to Phase 7 polish.

title: Build shared page template (header, nav, footer)
description: Reusable HTML structure with fixed nav, mobile-responsive hamburger menu, footer with links.

title: IdentificationChallenge.js -- Species ID modal
description: Standalone UI component. HTML modal overlay. Shows large salamander canvas rendering, feature checklist (guided/standard difficulty), species radio buttons, submit. Contextual options based on animal color. Feedback on correct/incorrect. Tracks accuracy per species. Depends on config.js, Salamander.

title: Phase 2A: vite-plugin-static-copy for site shell into dist/
description: Configure vite-plugin-static-copy (or a prebuild script) to copy the static field-notebook tree (index.html, about/, publications/, resources/, experiments/, assets/css/) into dist/ during build. The deploy.sh upload becomes a single rsync of dist/.

title: Design simulation engine architecture
description: Document core classes and interfaces before coding: Simulation, Environment, Agent, DataCollector, HUD.

title: Wire batesian-mimicry sim into index.html
description: Update experiments/batesian-mimicry/index.html: replace Coming Soon button with working launch. Add sim container div. Import and bootstrap BatesianMimicrySim. Add batesian-mimicry CSS if needed. Test full flow: setup -> survey -> data collection -> analysis -> CSV export.

title: Implement Mallard Duck IFD simulation
description: Two bread-toss locations at a pond.

title: Phase 2C: SettingsMenu UI bound to settings store
description: src/engine/hud/SettingsMenu.tsx. Three columns desktop (Graphics / Audio / Controls), Accessibility tab. Preset buttons LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/ULTRA styled as filter-btn. (custom) indicator when toggles diverge from preset. Accessibility tab includes colorblind mode, reduce motion, subtitles, font scale, high contrast, screen reader hints. VR-only: pre-session, not reachable mid-session.

title: Whale Migration simulation
description: Map-based tracking, sea temperature and food overlays, migration corridor analysis.

title: Decide WebGPU promotion to default renderer
description: Open question Q3 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. Track Safari and Quest browser parity. Re-evaluate at Phase 7 polish gate. WebGPU is offered as a settings toggle marked experimental in the meantime.

title: Build IFD data collection tools
description: Patch-count interface, time-series recorder, chi-square calculator for IFD experiments.

title: 3D CoverObject3D.js -- Interactive 3D cover objects
description: 3D meshes for rock/log/board/bark placed from config transect data. PBR materials. Rim-light highlight on hover (shader). Flip animation: 90deg rotation on edge pivot over 600ms. Soil reveal mesh underneath. LOD x3. Hit detection via raycaster.

title: Phase 2C: LoadingScreen with asset progress
description: src/engine/hud/LoadingScreen.tsx. Field-journal-cover styled. Progress bar + current asset name in Fira Code. Subscribes to AssetManager onProgress. Dismisses when tier 1 completes. VR variant: 2D plane in front of camera before scene is ready.

title: Implement session persistence
description: Save/resume experiments, data storage on server.

title: Phase 2B2: Audio loader with shared Howler + Three.js AudioContext
description: Per docs/research/audio-architecture.md section 1. Construct AudioContext once, assign Howler.ctx and THREE.AudioListener.context. Howler pinned to 2.2.4. Try/catch fallback if shared-context assignment ever fails. PositionalAudio sources decode to AudioBuffer (no streaming).

title: Walrus Acoustics simulation
description: Web Audio API, spectrogram visualization, vocalization categorization at arctic haul-out.

title: Phase 2B1: Lab module loader and LabHost lifecycle
description: src/engine/runtime/loadLabModule.ts and LabHost.tsx. Implements the contract in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 3.1 (LabContext, Lab, LabModule). Dynamic import per labId, builds LabContext (scene root, Rapier world placeholder, store slice, asset manifest), calls lab.init, mounts Canvas + Scene + HUD. On unmount calls lab.dispose, ResourceTracker walks tag set in reverse, terminates worker, drops Rapier world. Idempotent dispose.

title: ForestEnvironment enhanced ground rendering
description: Modify ForestEnvironment.js: use TextureGenerator for richer _prerenderBackground (250-350 leaf ellipses, noise-varied soil, pebble scatter, soft elliptical shadows). Add renderApproachDetail(ctx, coverObj, scale) for high-detail ground patch in approach view.

title: Mark-Recapture simulation
description: Capture sessions, mark/release/recapture, Lincoln-Petersen estimation.

title: Phase 2B3: Unified action map types and Zustand input slice
description: src/engine/input/actionMap.ts. ActionId union, ButtonAction/AxisAction types per docs/research/interaction-system.md section 8. Default bindings table. The input system runs in useFrame at priority -100. justPressed/justReleased exposed via thin event bus to avoid React re-render churn at 90+ Hz; held state in Zustand.

title: Build instructor dashboard
description: Create courses, assign experiments, view student progress.

title: CoverObject approach-view rendering
description: Modify CoverObject.js: add renderApproach(ctx) with per-type detail -- bark grain on logs, lichen spots on rocks, weathering on boards, moss patches. Tune flip animation: 400ms with ease-out cubic. Cursor affordances: pointer->grab->grabbing.

title: WeatherSystem.js -- Weather generation and modifiers
description: Standalone module. Generates weather from date/region using seasonal baselines. Returns temperature, humidity, precipitation, cloud cover, wind. Provides encounter probability modifier. Supports mid-survey weather transitions. Depends on config.js.

title: ParticleSystem.js -- Ambient atmosphere particles
description: New file. Falling leaves, dust motes. Pool of max 20 particles. spawn(), update(dt), render(ctx, camera). Leaf particles: slow rotation, drift. Dust: random walk in light beams. Count adjusts per view (12 transect, 6 approach, 2 examination).

title: Decide service worker / PWA enable
description: Open question Q4 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. Plumbing is wired in vite.config.ts but registerType is prompt and registration gated by VITE_PWA_ENABLED=false. Decide at Phase 7 polish whether to flip on.

title: Implement Viceroy/Monarch mimicry
description: Meadow environment, Viceroy butterfly mimicking Monarch.

title: Build base Simulation class
description: Canvas init, game loop, time management, play/pause/speed controls, pan/zoom.

title: 3D assets -- Download and optimize PBR textures, HDRI, audio
description: Download CC0 assets: Poly Haven leaf litter 2K, soil 1K, rock 1K, bark 1K, moss 1K, wood 1K, mossy_forest HDRI. ambientCG Ground037, Moss001. Freesound ambient + interaction audio. Compress to WebP/PNG/OGG. Organize in assets/ directory. Total under 15MB.

title: Implement Coot IFD simulation
description: Pond with aquatic vegetation patches, American Coots.

title: Phase 2: Mulberry32 seeded RNG + gaussian + binomial sampler
description: src/engine/utils/prng.ts. Implement Mulberry32 as the canonical Rng implementation (interface { next(): number }). Port gaussianRandom (Box-Muller, two-pull pattern preserved) and binomialSample (Bernoulli loop, NEVER replace with normal approximation). Include an assertExactBinomial unit test that runs binomialSample(10000, 0.5) under seed 42 and asserts the exact integer. Comment 'DO NOT REPLACE WITH NORMAL APPROXIMATION' at the top of the file. The legacy code uses Math.random; the new code injects Rng everywhere.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover Mulberry32 sequence reproduction, gaussianRandom against fixed seed, binomialSample exact-integer assertion

title: Implement Bumblebee IFD simulation
description: Meadow with artificial flower patches and variable nectar rewards.

title: Phase 2C: PauseOverlay with menu hierarchy
description: src/engine/hud/PauseOverlay.tsx. ESC triggers. Resume / Restart (with confirmation) / Settings / Quit. Parchment card on rgba(43,43,43,0.65) film. Framer Motion fade + slide on entry; instant cut under reduceMotion. The pause contract (physics frozen, audio ducked, science state preserved) is engine-owned per ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 3.4.

title: Implement Kingsnake/Coral Snake mimicry
description: Forest environment with color band patterns, Scarlet Kingsnake mimicking Eastern Coral Snake.

title: Salamander illustration upgrade
description: Modify Salamander.js renderLarge(): dorsal highlight gradient, ventral shadow, specular wet spots, granular stippling for NOVI via seeded PRNG. Costal grooves as curved lines. Three-layer eye rendering. Irregular oval spots for P. ruber with age-dependent density. Seeded spot positions.

title: Create beach environment
description: Sandy/rocky beach canvas, ocean, time-of-day lighting, spatial zones for elephant seal sim.

title: [asset][research] Phase 0 Agent 5: Asset Pipeline & Performance Budget
description: Asset formats (GLB+Draco+Meshopt, KTX2, OGG/Opus), loaders, streaming, LOD strategy, performance budgets per device, free CC0 sources, author-side workflow (Blender, gltf-transform). Output: docs/research/asset-pipeline.md

title: Phase 2B3: Gamepad input source with deadzone and aim curve
description: src/engine/input/sources/gamepad.ts. navigator.getGamepads polled per frame. Standard mapping. Radial deadzone 0.12 with remap to [0,1]. Square aim curve on right stick. Default bindings per docs/research/interaction-system.md section 5.

title: Phase 2B3: Keyboard + mouse input source
description: src/engine/input/sources/keyboardMouse.ts. Document keyboard listeners cached into Set<string>, mouse pointer-lock for look. Writes into the action map slice each frame. Defaults match docs/research/interaction-system.md section 8.3.

title: Decide static experiment HTML island vs full SPA per page
description: Open question Q8 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. The current plan keeps the field-notebook static pages and mounts the SPA as an island. Confirm before Phase 5 vs converting to full-screen cinematic SPA per experiment with a 'Field Notes' tab for the methods text.

title: Phase 2B2: Asset cache, useGLTF/useTexture/useAudio hooks, disposal accounting
description: Wraps drei's useGLTF/useTexture for progress and disposal accounting per docs/research/asset-pipeline.md section 3. Cache keyed on URL. useGLTF returns cloned scene, underlying geo/material shared. disposeScene(labId) walks the per-lab tag set via ResourceTracker.

title: Implement Stickleback IFD simulation
description: Lab tank with two food-delivery pipes.

title: Build guided analysis walkthroughs
description: Step-by-step tutorials per dataset for data analysis.

title: 3D InputManager.js -- Unified VR + desktop input
description: Abstracts VR controllers and desktop mouse/keyboard. getInteractionRay(), onSelect(cb), onGrip(cb), isVR(). Desktop: raycasts from screen center. VR: raycasts from controller. Game logic subscribes once, works both modes.

title: Create shared CSS design system
description: Base stylesheet with CSS custom properties, typography, spacing, components. Field notebook aesthetic.

title: Build landing page
description: Hero section, mission statement, how-it-works steps, experiment preview cards, target audience, CTAs.

title: Phase 2B1: localforage save/load adapter with versioned zod migration
description: src/engine/state/saveStore.ts. localforage instance scoped to 'borchard-labs'. Two file types: save:global, save:lab:<id>. Each carries a version integer. zod schemas validate on load; up-migration ladders per docs/research/game-systems.md section 1.3. Failed migrations discard with a 'Could not resume' toast (no throw). Save schema includes the worker mulberry32 RNG state. Cap pendingRows at 500 to stay under Safari quota; above 500 prompt for CSV download.
acceptance_criteria: Round-trip test: save state, reload, dump state, deep-equal. Migration test: load v0 fixture, assert v-current shape. Discard test: load future-version, asserts safe fallback

title: Implement auth (registration/login)
description: Session-based authentication, bcrypt hashing. No OAuth initially.

title: Build dataset library page
description: Curated datasets with descriptions, download links, suggested analyses.

title: Phase 2: CaptionSystem skeleton + CaptionOverlay
description: src/engine/audio/CaptionSystem.ts and the HUD overlay component. Per docs/research/audio-architecture.md section 9. captionBus.emit/on, JSON sidecar files alongside audio assets, CaptionOverlay bottom-third semi-transparent container. aria-live polite/assertive routing. VR variant via uikit panel billboarded.

title: Phase 2B2: Asset priority queue with progress events
description: src/engine/assets/LoadQueue.ts. Four tiers per docs/research/asset-pipeline.md section 4. Tier 1 blocks display; tier 2-4 stream in. maxConcurrent = 4. Nearest-first sort for cover objects. Progress events feed the loading screen store.

title: 3D SalamanderRenderer.js -- 3D salamander models + textures
description: 1 GLTF base mesh + 4 morph targets (headLarge, headSmall, tailLong, tailKeeled). 8 canvas-rendered texture sets from config.js species data. Per-individual hue/sat variation. Eye sphere with emissive iris. Costal groove displacement. Breathing animation. VR: attach to controller for in-hand examination.

title: Phase 2B1: Zustand game store with sliced architecture
description: src/engine/state/gameStore.ts. Compose slices: transport, current (labId + publicState discriminated union), settings, notebook, progression, save metadata. Per ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 3.2 and docs/research/engine-architecture.md section 4. Selectors should use shallow equality. All slice mutations through typed actions, not free-form sets.

title: Build published research display
description: Journal-article-style rendering, citable URL, raw data download.

title: Build review workflow
description: Faculty review queue, comments, approve/revise/publish status tracking.

title: Build video observation interface
description: Embedded player with timestamped annotation tools for field footage.

title: Design IFD simulation framework
description: Shared resource-patch system, animal redistribution mechanics for Ideal Free Distribution sims.

title: 3D AudioManager.js -- Ambient + positional + interaction sounds
description: Web Audio API + Three.js PositionalAudio. Ambient forest loop (birds, wind, stream). Positional stream audio. Interaction sounds: leaf crunch, rock scrape, wet soil. Spatial audio in VR. Volume control + mute. Total audio under 600KB.

title: Implement elephant seal agents
description: Alpha male, subordinates, females, pups with appropriate behaviors and state machines.

title: Build simulation HUD
description: Timer, conditions display, playback controls, help toggle overlay.

title: Phase 5 epic: Hardy-Weinberg migration
description: Port HWPopulation math, configs, CSV columns to TypeScript. Stratigraphic column 3D visual treatment. 2D chart HUD overlay. Determinism golden tests for seeds 1, 7, 13, 17, 23, 31, 47. See ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 9.1. Detailed tasks file when Phase 4 gate passes.

title: Phase 3 epic: visual excellence layer
description: Renderer + post chain (Team 3A), environment systems (Team 3B), lighting + atmospherics (Team 3C). Visual benchmark gate at end. See ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 11. Detailed tasks file when Phase 2 gate passes.

title: SoundManager.js -- Web Audio API ambient and interaction sounds
description: New file. Optional but high-impact. AudioContext wrapper. loadSound(), play(), stop(), setMasterVolume(), mute(). Sounds: ambient-forest loop, leaf-crunch, rock-scrape, soil-squelch. Total audio under 300KB. Defer if scope too large.

title: TextureGenerator.js -- Procedural noise and ground textures
description: New file. 2D value noise with cosine interpolation, 2-3 octave fractal stacking. Methods: generateNoise2D(), renderGroundTexture() for soil+litter, renderDetailPatch() for approach-view high-detail, renderMoss(). Noise must run <50ms for 512x512.

title: Decide salamander mesh authoring approach
description: Open question Q2 in ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 12. No CC0 source meets the bar for VR close-up examination of diagnostic features (costal grooves, eye color, spot pattern, skin variation). Choose between custom Blender base mesh with eight texture variants (preferred per docs/research/migration-plan.md), or stylized base + photographic decals. Decision required before Phase 6 starts.

title: Source field research footage
description: Find CC-licensed or permission-granted footage for video observation module.

title: Build base Environment class
description: Background rendering, zone definitions, environmental parameters, time-of-day system.

title: Phase 2: PerfMonitor exposing window.__BORCHARD_STATS for CI gate
description: src/engine/perf/PerfMonitor.ts. Per docs/research/asset-pipeline.md section 11.3. Tracks a 300-frame window of frame times, computes p95, reads renderer.info, exposes triangles/drawCalls/textureVRAM/frameTimeP95 on window.__BORCHARD_STATS. Sets window.__BORCHARD_READY = true when the lab has finished its critical-path load. Used by scripts/perf-gate.ts.

title: Phase 2B1: ResourceTracker for lifecycle disposal accounting
description: src/engine/runtime/ResourceTracker.ts. Tags every BufferGeometry, Material, Texture, AudioBuffer, Rapier handle at allocation. Walks the tag set in reverse on dispose. Ensures no shared assets are freed if another lab still references them. Single most common WebGL leak source -- treated as hard contract per ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 3.3.

title: Thermal Biology simulation
description: Temperature-performance curves, CTmin/CTmax determination, climate vulnerability assessment.

title: FieldSetup.js -- Survey configuration screen
description: Extends ConfigScreen. Overrides getParams() with survey parameters: month, day, site type, cover object count, transect count, ID feedback mode, tutorial toggle, forced encounters. Shows weather preview after date selection. Depends on config.js.

title: Implement Salamander/Newt mimicry
description: Forest floor environment, Red Salamander mimicking Eastern Newt.

title: [audio][research] Phase 0 Agent 4: Audio Architecture
description: Audio pipeline (Howler + PositionalAudio), bus architecture, adaptive audio, CC0 source library, compression formats, procedural audio cases (Tone.js), VR spatial audio (HRTF). Output: docs/research/audio-architecture.md

title: ViewManager.js -- Camera state and view transitions
description: New file. Manages three-view camera system (transect/approach/examination). Animated ctx.setTransform() transitions with easing curves. Methods: transitionTo(), applyTransform(), screenToWorld(), worldToScreen(), isTransitioning(). Ease-out cubic for zoom-in, smoothstep for zoom-out.

title: Phase 2: RFC 4180 CSV utility with unit tests
description: src/engine/utils/csv.ts. Single source of truth for CSV escaping. Cover: quote-on-comma, quote-on-doublequote, quote-on-CRLF, doubled internal quotes, CRLF line endings, trailing CRLF. Unit tests cover the RFC 4180 examples. Replaces the duplicate copies in legacy DataCollector.escapeCSVField and FieldNotebook.escapeCSV.

title: [physics][research] Phase 0 Agent 3: Physics, Character Controller, Interaction
description: Specify physics layer and player/avatar interaction. Rapier integration, FPS controller, third-person camera, object grab/release, gamepad/touch/VR input, unified action map, collision audio + haptics. Output: docs/research/interaction-system.md

title: Tide Pool ecology simulation
description: Intertidal zonation, quadrat placement, species identification and counting.

title: Phase 2A: Vite + TypeScript + React + R3F project scaffold
description: Bootstrap the new Vite app at the repo root per ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 2. Include the package.json pin list from docs/research/engine-architecture.md section 5, the vite.config.ts from section 5.4 with COOP/COEP commented out, and the tsconfig.json from section 5.5 with strict mode plus the extra strictness flags from ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 2.3. Path aliases @engine, @labs, @ui, @assets. Verify a placeholder R3F Canvas mounts and renders a single mesh. This is foundational and blocks every other Phase 2 issue.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm dev serves a page that mounts an R3F Canvas with a visible cube; pnpm build succeeds; tsc strict passes with zero errors

title: Phase 2A: Tailwind 4 layered over assets/css/main.css design tokens
description: Tailwind 4 CSS-first integration. Use @theme directives to expose the existing custom properties from assets/css/main.css (--parchment, --ink, --forest, --gold, --rust, --font-heading, --font-body, --font-mono) as Tailwind tokens. Do not rewrite main.css; layer Tailwind utilities on top for new HUD components only.

title: [render][research] Phase 0 Agent 2: Visual Quality & Rendering Pipeline
description: Define rendering pipeline for AAA browser bar. WebGL2 vs WebGPU, tone mapping, lighting model, post chain (SSAO/bloom/DOF/etc), atmospheric effects, materials library, vegetation, water, sky. Output: docs/research/rendering-pipeline.md

title: Playtest and validate elephant seal simulation
description: Does collected data reveal meaningful patterns? Iterate on behavior model and UI.

title: Design color palette and branding
description: Scientific/academic field notebook aesthetic. Earth tones, forest greens, ocean blues. CSS custom properties.

title: Build DataCollector UI component
description: Side panel for recording observations, CSV/JSON export, running data table.

title: Phase 2C: ToastNotification system with VR queue
description: src/engine/hud/ToastNotification.tsx. Stack in bottom-right. Save indicator / discovery / badge / error categories with left-stripe colors. Framer Motion AnimatePresence; instant under reduceMotion. In VR, suppress and queue into notifications.vr_queue; surface on session end. Save indicator in VR fires a single 50ms haptic pulse instead.

title: Salamander.js -- Animal agent with species rendering
description: Extends Agent. Generates traits from species distributions via gaussianRandom. Canvas 2D rendering at two scales: 40-60px (forest floor) and 200-300px (ID challenge). Species-specific drawing: body proportions, coloration, spot patterns, tail shape, eye color. Individual variation via hue/saturation offsets. Depends on config.js.

title: Set up backend server
description: Flask or Express, API endpoints for auth, data, publications.

title: [migration][research] Phase 0 Agent 7: Migration Plan -- Hardy-Weinberg & Batesian Mimicry
description: Read existing sim/experiments code. Document public API. Define new R3F+TS component shape. Determinism strategy (snapshot CSV, byte-equal). Visual translation. Risk register. Output: docs/research/migration-plan.md

title: Phase 2: AdaptiveAudioProfile interface + AdaptiveAudioManager
description: src/engine/audio/AdaptiveAudioProfile.ts. Interface declared so labs can implement their own state/zone/layer matrix. Manager polls profiles every 1s; transitions via Howl.fade with 4000ms state crossfade and 2000ms zone crossfade. Read-only; never mutates simulation.

title: Phase 2C: FieldNotebook frame component (entry-form scaffold)
description: src/engine/hud/FieldNotebookFrame.tsx. The diegetic notebook surface, ruled-line parchment, header strip. Provides openEntry/closeEntry/onSave hooks and emits notebook:saved to the game bus. The lab-specific row schema is plugged in by each lab. VR variant via uikit at 1.2m x 0.8m chest height.

title: Define project directory structure
description: Create folder layout: site pages, sim engine, assets, data/datasets, experiment subdirectories for all 16 experiments.

title: 3D SceneBuilder.js -- Terrain, vegetation, lighting, atmosphere
description: Terrain: PlaneGeometry 60x60, 256x256 subdivs, FBM displacement. PBR leaf litter material (Poly Haven). Instanced trees (5-8), ferns (40-80), rhodo (8-15). Canopy alpha-cut plane. DirectionalLight + HemisphereLight. HDRI env map. Dust particles (Points). Falling leaf sprites.

title: EventEngine.js -- Probabilistic encounter generator
description: Standalone module. Takes environmental state + cover object properties, returns encounter result (null, invertebrate, Salamander, special event). Applies seasonal, weather, time-of-day, microhabitat modifiers. Handles forced encounters, spatial autocorrelation via Beta(2,5) quality scores. Depends on config.js, WeatherSystem.

title: Implement Starling IFD simulation
description: Field with feeding stations, European Starlings.

title: Predator-Prey dynamics simulation
description: Lotka-Volterra cycling, real-time population graphs, parameter manipulation.

title: Build publication browse/search
description: Filter by experiment, author, date. Search abstracts and full text.

title: Territorial Behavior simulation
description: Song playback experiments, response intensity measurement, Dear Enemy Effect.

title: Design mimicry simulation framework
description: Predator learning, mimic/model frequency manipulation, encounter mechanics for Batesian mimicry sims.

title: Build research report submission form
description: Structured form or markdown editor, figure upload for student publications.

title: Phase 2C: HUD container components (HUDPanel, DataReadout)
description: src/engine/hud/HudPanel.tsx and DataReadout.tsx. The base parchment surfaces every HUD piece composes onto. Token map per docs/research/game-systems.md section 3.2. DataReadout uses Fira Code for values, Source Sans 3 for labels.

title: Phase 2 -> Phase 3 ratification gate
description: Run feature-dev:code-reviewer over the full Phase 2 surface. Verify ratification criteria from ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 11: Vite + React + R3F builds, lab host mounts a placeholder scene, asset manager loads a sample GLB end to end, settings menu round trips a value through localforage, all Phase 2 unit tests green, lint and type checks green. Mason ratifies before Phase 3 begins.

title: Hardy-Weinberg simulation
description: Allele frequencies, evolutionary forces toggles, generation-by-generation tracking.

title: Phase 2A: ESLint 9 flat config + Prettier 3 with --max-warnings=0
description: ESLint 9 flat config including @typescript-eslint, react-hooks, and a no-literal-string rule scoped to src/engine/hud/. Prettier 3 with the project's existing style (the existing site files set the conventions). pnpm lint must pass clean on the scaffold from Phase 2A scaffold issue.

title: Phase 4 epic: physics, character controller, VR, audio
description: Team 4A physics + first-person controller + grab. Team 4B VR mode (XR, teleport, snap turn, hand tracking). Team 4C audio system end-to-end. See ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 11. Detailed tasks file when Phase 3 gate passes.

title: 3D index.html -- Import map, bootstrap, overlay containers
description: Add Three.js import map to <head>. Replace Canvas 2D bootstrap with 3d/main.js entry point. Keep FieldSetup config screen. Add overlay containers for desktop HTML panels. VRButton auto-shown if WebXR available. Loading screen with progress bar.

title: Phase 6 epic: Batesian Mimicry migration
description: Port config tables, EventEngine, WeatherSystem, FieldNotebook, AnalysisPanel, salamander trait rolling. Cove hardwood forest scene reusing Phase 3 environment systems. ID challenge dual-mount, weather audio mapping. Determinism golden tests for seeds 101, 103, 107, 109, 113. See ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 9.2. Detailed tasks file when Phase 5 gate passes.

title: Write experiment descriptions (all 16)
description: Content for each experiment description page covering all 16 research simulations.

title: Phase 2: AudioBuses skeleton with bus graph and ducking
description: src/engine/audio/AudioBuses.ts. Six buses (master, music, ambience, sfx, ui, voice) plus the spatial bus per docs/research/audio-architecture.md section 2. setTargetAtTime smoothing on volume changes. Notebook-open ducking, tab-blur master mute. Settings-bus binding via Zustand subscriber (not React render).

title: Phase 7 epic: roadmap and polish
description: Per-experiment engine-shaped scope work for the remaining 14 labs (ENGINE-DESIGN.md section 10). Performance profiling pass. Accessibility pass. Cross-browser and cross-device pass. PWA decision. Landing page video. Detailed tasks file when Phase 6 gate passes.

title: 3D VRControls.js -- Teleport, snap-turn, grip interaction
description: WebXR controller setup. Left: trigger=teleport (parabolic arc, 8m max, fade transition), thumbstick=snap-turn 30deg. Right: trigger=select, grip=grab. XRControllerModelFactory for hand models. Haptic feedback on events.

title: Build Resources page
description: Stats guides, thesis writing tips, data analysis tutorials. Resource cards with coming-soon tags.

title: Phase 2A: Vitest + Playwright test harness
description: Vitest configured for the scaffold with happy-dom for DOM tests and node for pure-logic tests. Playwright with one browser (Chromium) and one smoke spec that loads the scaffold page. Wire pnpm test, pnpm test:e2e scripts.

title: IdentificationChallenge side panel conversion
description: Modify IdentificationChallenge.js: convert from centered modal+backdrop to right-edge slide-in panel (350px, CSS transition). Canvas stays visible on left with animal in context. Panel slides in over 300ms. Feature hints as inline cards. Adjust canvas container width on show/hide.

title: Design elephant seal behavior model
description: Behavioral states, transition probabilities, based on real ethogram data for Mirounga angustirostris.

title: Plant Phenology simulation
description: Seasonal time-lapse, climate warming scenarios, phenological mismatch detection.

title: Phase 2: scripts/perf-gate.ts headless Puppeteer perf gate
description: Per docs/research/asset-pipeline.md section 11. Loads each lab in headless Puppeteer, reads window.__BORCHARD_STATS, asserts triangles/drawCalls hard, frame time and texture VRAM warning-only until a GPU runner exists. Gate runs on PRs touching src/engine, src/labs, public/labs, scripts/budgets.ts. Skipped on doc-only PRs. Add scripts/budgets.ts with empty record (labs add entries as they ship).

title: Set up deployment pipeline
description: deploy.sh with rsync, nginx config on VPS for borchardlabs.com, DNS setup.

title: Water Quality simulation
description: Kick-net sampling, dichotomous key identification, biotic index calculation.

title: [ui][research] Phase 0 Agent 6: Game Systems -- Save/Load, Progression, HUD
description: Save/load via localforage, progression (badges, journal), diegetic HUD design, settings menu, pause behavior, onboarding, telemetry. Respect Borchard Labs design system. Output: docs/research/game-systems.md
